configurations.name: convite
runtimeArgs: const h=require('http'),f=require('fs'),p=require('path');const mt={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'application/javascript','svg':'image/svg+xml','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','json':'application/json'};h.createServer((q,r)=>{let u=q.url==='/'?'/index.html':q.url;const fp=p.join(process.cwd(),decodeURIComponent(u));f.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){r.writeHead(404);r.end('Not found');return}const ext=p.extname(fp).slice(1);r.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mt[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});r.end(d)})}).listen(3000,()=>console.log('Server running on http://localhost:3000'))
